# KavachOS

> The Auth OS for AI Agents

KavachOS is an open-source TypeScript auth SDK that treats AI agents as first-class identities. It provides agent identity lifecycle, permission engine with wildcard matching, agent-to-agent delegation chains, immutable audit logging, and an MCP-spec-compliant OAuth 2.1 authorization server.

## Documentation

- [Introduction](https://kavachos.com/docs)
- [Quickstart](https://kavachos.com/docs/quickstart)
- [Agent Identity](https://kavachos.com/docs/core/agents)
- [Permission Engine](https://kavachos.com/docs/core/permissions)
- [Delegation Chains](https://kavachos.com/docs/core/delegation)
- [Audit Trail](https://kavachos.com/docs/core/audit)
- [MCP OAuth 2.1](https://kavachos.com/docs/platform/mcp)
- [Framework Adapters](https://kavachos.com/docs/platform/adapters)
- [Admin Dashboard](https://kavachos.com/docs/platform/dashboard)

## Install

```
npm install kavachos
```

## Source Code

https://github.com/kavachos/kavachos
